Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC6CA "STUNTMANSEYMOUR-0400-C6CA" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 jsr $0400 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Stuntman Seymour.prg"
Metadata.Notes:
Added an init routine at $0400 which copies 512 bytes of data from $0430 down to $0000 so that the dump can start at $0400 (this is the state the memory was in after the depacker from the original game had finished - this allows us to skip this slow step). It then jumps to the entry point at $C6CA (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the stack).
Note: as the original game is frozen, the breakpoint to use for dumping is actually $BF00.
